message:
fix(cli): return valid JSON for empty results in archive and products commands

When --json flag is set, empty-result paths now emit proper JSON
instead of human-readable messages:
- archive list: emit "[]" when archive dir missing or no states found
- products search: emit {"result": []} when query invalid, no projects
  matched, or results empty
- products inbox: emit "[]" when no messages found

This ensures CLI JSON output is always machine-parseable regardless
of whether results exist, enabling reliable scripting and piping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
